rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement drives a stock market surge directly affecting US investors and retirement accounts, while the geopolitical pivot is a major domestic political story with real policy implications.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', stock markets surge
top_events.summary: Markets rally sharply on news of a US-Iran deal and cancellation of strikes; directly affects US investors, 401(k)s, and oil prices at the pump — a tangible financial event for American households.

top_events.title: Hegseth warns Cuba against acquiring weapons at Guantánamo visit
top_events.summary: US Defense Secretary's visit and warning to Cuba signals active military posturing in the Western Hemisphere; relevant to US foreign policy and potential military commitments.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot during US consulate attack investigation
top_events.summary: Attack near a US consulate in Canada raises security concerns for US diplomatic personnel and cross-border security cooperation.
